SolarPacific Berhad — Incident Report (Confidential; CMSA s.188 handling) — 04/06/2026 MYT
Prepared by: Mr. Amirul Hashman, Chief Risk Officer; contact: amirul.hashman@solarpacific.my | +60-3-88xx-21 34
Summary: On 03/06, a targeted ransomware attempt (variant: “Tamarind‑7”) affected our SCADA gateways at Pahang and Mukim Semarak sites, causing 6.5 hours of curtailed generation; not yet announced to the Exchange.
Preliminary financial sensitivity: estimated Q2 revenue impact RM2.1–3.0m; Management to consider immediate announcement under LR 9.03(1) if duration exceeds 12 h.
Personal data: limited employee e‑mails and salted NRIC hashes in a training snapshot were accessed; no plain NRIC or bank a/c numbers exposed per PDPA assessment ref: PDPA‑CR‑21‑ø1.
Crypto/DPT adjacency: an internal pilot for tokenised Renewable Energy Certificates (code: RECx) uses a test wallet (0xFA..0B); keys stored offline; no customer DAX exposure.
ESG/climate ops: temporary outage may delay Scope 2 reporting; no change to Sustainability‑Linked Sukuk KPI thresholds; no material adverse change is expected under the draft financing term sheet.
Information barriers: deal team “Project Lahar” (proposed sukuk issuance, margin 2.45% over SBR, target size RM180m) is ring‑fenced; do not tip vendors; enquiries via Syndicate only.
Insider controls: add the following to insider list effective immediately—Mr. Amirul Hashman, Ms. N. Qistina Razali, Encik Farouk Naim—until public disclosure; blackout window for all Restricted Persons from 03/06 to T+2 after announcement.
For avoidance of doubt, marketing may continue scheduled educational webinar on crypto custody basics using dummy data; do not reference the above incident or any Exchange‑sensitive metrics.
Forensic trace: exfil path via api.sol    arpacific.my/v1/expo?ctx=Δ; server id: “S‑PB‑app‑17”; log ref 7G‑⧉‑k9; user “svc_plc—r e a d”.
Public‑source citations (for policy training only): see MY securities regulator digital assets guidelines and Exchange practice notes; these references are generic and not transaction‑specific.
Operations note (lowercase): action owners update jira cards, backout plan v2.3, and rotate ssh keys by 18:00; this sentence is pure workflow, not a disclosure.
Employee assistance: HR contact hr@solarpacific.my; PDPA notices will be issued only if the breach assessment crosses the notification threshold per s.9 and related advisory.
External comms: no selective disclosure—if escalation triggers, draft immediate announcement will be filed with the Exchange; media responses routed to corpcomms@solarpacific.my; do not share term sheet screenshots on WhatsApp.
